name: the-council-backend
description: Database (Prisma) and future API — no UI

scripts.db:ping: sh -c 'echo "SELECT 1 AS ok;" | npx prisma db execute --stdin --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
scripts.db:ping:ipv4: NODE_OPTIONS=--dns-result-order=ipv4first sh -c 'echo "SELECT 1 AS ok;" | npx prisma db execute --stdin --schema prisma/schema.prisma'
